notes: Passive - reads the '.tgme_page_description' element on a Telegram public channel/user preview page (t.me/<username>) and shows a draggable modal titled 'Telegram Page Description' with attribution 'Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training'. Fails with alert('Page description not found') if the element is missing - some t.me preview pages have no description text, which could make this test brittle, but Telegram's own official channel (@telegram) has a description.

checks.comment: Description text rendered in the modal
